caption: 嘴上说没有。
scene: Sage seated at a small desk in front of two stacked monitors with a tiny webcam dot on top showing a small crossed-out camera icon, one paw resting flat on a mechanical keyboard, a faint flat line for a mouth, a small tangle of question marks hovering just above his head.
bible_hook: §2 Sage's standup at 10 — 'Any blockers?' 'No.' (There are blockers.) Camera off in standup on WFH days
rationale: Recent posts hit Sage's button-radius crit and film-scan win but never the daily standup ritual; this anchors a fresh work moment (the silent lie, camera off) instead of repeating gym, coffee, or crit motifs.
